arts.sum: For Christmas week we remember some important games and wins in Lazio history particularly a 2-2 in nine men at Palermo in 2007. arts.ttl: Lazio’s pursuit of Fazzini: Lotito hesitates amid financial considerations
arts.sum: Lazio's search for midfield reinforcements has led them to Empoli's young talent Jacopo Fazzini, but club president Claudio Lotito is proceeding with caution due to financial constraints. The 21-year-old Italian midfielder has caught the eye of several Serie A clubs, including Fiorentina, with Empoli president Fabrizio Corsi reportedly valuing the player at €14-15 million. The post Lazio’s pursuit of Fazzini: Lotito hesitates amid financial considerations appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Lazio v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season approaches its midpoint, Lazio prepare to host league leaders Atalanta at the Stadio Olimpico in a highly anticipated clash. With both teams in formidable form, this match promises to be a thrilling encounter that could have significant implications for the title race.
